Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Candle Bay]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Candle Bay is a harbor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Candle Bay is a location where the ship could potentially sink.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Candle Bay is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Candle Bay is visible from the window in Rojric's cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Candle Bay has staff that investigate prison breaks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Candle Bay is directly connected to the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Calder jumps into Candle Bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Candle Bay is a location where Calder abandoned contingency tools.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Kelarac made a bargain to escape Candle Bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder steered his ship toward Candle Bay.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Candle Bay is a location where the Lyathatan arrived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Candle Bay was close to the group.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Candle Bay is a location where fish are caught.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — An armored Estyr Six flew over to Candle Bay.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
